content.text:
<session>
I have noticed that my sessions.jsonl is getting very large. Is there a way to create a new folder such that each json is split by their own session, and whenever a new session is created, a new jsonl is created as well. Please also change record_to_tasks and any other files that will be affect by this to make sure that the file size stays not that big. Please also split the current sessions.jsonl into this new format
</session>

Write the title in the language the user wrote in, regardless of the language of the examples above.

system.text: You are Claude Code, Anthropic's official CLI for Claude.
